task_completion.description: Create an Activity log named 'Worker hygiene training sign-in' marked as Done.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the farmOS Field Kit app, there should be an Activity log named 'Worker hygiene training sign-in'. It must be marked as 'Done'. Look for the time set to 6:30 AM and notes containing '7 field workers signed FSMA hygiene training attestation form HYG-2024-03...'.

task_completion.description: Create an Input log named 'Irrigation well water E.coli sampling' marked as Done.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the farmOS Field Kit app, there should be an Input log named 'Irrigation well water E.coli sampling'. It must be marked as 'Done'. Look for the time set to 8:00 AM.

task_completion.description: Create an Activity log named 'Field harvest bin sanitation log' marked as Done.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the farmOS Field Kit app, there should be an Activity log named 'Field harvest bin sanitation log'. It must be marked as 'Done'.

task_completion.description: Create an Observation log named 'Field border wildlife intrusion check' marked as NOT Done.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the farmOS Field Kit app, there should be an Observation log named 'Field border wildlife intrusion check'. It must NOT be marked as 'Done' (status should be pending, unchecked, or NOT Done).

task_completion.description: Create an Activity log named 'GAP audit records daily review' marked as Done.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the farmOS Field Kit app, there should be an Activity log named 'GAP audit records daily review'. It must be marked as 'Done'.

integrity.description: Agent used the farmOS Field Kit GUI to create logs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the farmOS Field Kit interface, filling out forms, and saving logs, rather than using a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl requests to an API or direct database modifications (e.g., sqlite3) to create the logs.

integrity.description: Logs appear correctly in the application's log list.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the logs properly listed in the farmOS Field Kit app's log overview screen, confirming they were successfully saved in the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating 5 specific logs in farmOS Field Kit: 1. 'Worker hygiene training sign-in' (Activity, Done, 6:30 AM, with notes about 7 workers and sanitation units). 2. 'Irrigation well water E.coli sampling' (Input, Done, 8:00 AM). 3. 'Field harvest bin sanitation log' (Activity, Done). 4. 'Field border wildlife intrusion check' (Observation, NOT Done). 5. 'GAP audit records daily review' (Activity, Done). Note that log 4 must explicitly remain NOT Done. Passing threshold is 80/100 (4 out of 5 logs correct).
